headline: Is EQT (EQT) Undervalued Following Its Fourth Quarter Earnings Beat?
summary: EQT (EQT) recently reported fourth quarter results that exceeded Wall Street profit estimates. Higher natural gas prices, stronger sales volumes, and demand from data centers and LNG exports supported a 14.3% rise in realized gas prices. See our latest analysis for EQT. EQT’s share price has eased in recent months, with a 30 day share price return of down 4.27% and a 90 day share price return of down 12.33%. At the same time, the 5 year total shareholder return of 183.11% points to longer...
